title: Design System: Gawa Developer — ElevenLabs Direction

display-mega.purpose: Homepage hero h1 only. Waldenburg Light weight 300 at 64px, tightest tracking (-1.92px). The editorial signature — never bold.

display-xl.purpose: Subsidiary hero headlines on inner pages. Waldenburg Light 48px, -0.96px tracking.

display-md.purpose: Sub-section headings, card group titles. Waldenburg Light 32px, -0.32px tracking.

display-sm.purpose: Component group headers. Waldenburg Light 24px, neutral tracking.

title-md.purpose: Card titles, feature headings. Inter weight 500 at 20px — the Inter voice, not the editorial voice.

body-md.purpose: Default running text. Inter 16px weight 400, +0.16px tracking — slightly looser than raw Inter for editorial feel. Max-width 65–75ch.

caption-uppercase.purpose: Badge labels, section classifiers. Inter 12px weight 600, +0.96px tracking, all-caps. One deliberate brand kicker, not on every section.

button.purpose: CTA pill labels. Inter 15px weight 500, neutral tracking.

nav-link.purpose: Top navigation links. Inter 15px weight 500, neutral tracking.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Single hover shadow on feature cards. Appears on :hover only — surfaces are flat at rest.

motion.name: ease-smooth-reveal
motion.purpose: Ease-out-expo for scroll-triggered entrances and content reveals.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Material-standard easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-triggered section reveals and content entrance.

motion.name: stagger-child
motion.purpose: Stagger offset between children in a list reveal.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.note: Feature cards 1-up, navigation hamburger, hero h1 32px.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.note: Full hero at 64px, feature cards 3-up, desktop nav, hero split layout.

components.name: Primary Button — Ink Pill
components.description: The sole primary CTA. Near-black ink pill, white label. Never orange — the ink IS the signal.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #292524; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0c0a09; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #0c0a09; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #292524; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button — Transparent Pill
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent background, hairline border, ink text. Lower emphasis than the ink pill.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 9px 19px; background: transparent; color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0; border: 1px solid #d6d3d1; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #292524; background: rgba(12, 10, 9, 0.03); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #292524; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Badge Pill
components.description: Inline capability label. Surface-strong fill, ink text, uppercase caption tracking. Used on badges and classifiers — not as section eyebrows on every heading.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; background: #f0efed; color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.96px; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: 2-up or 3-up grid card. White surface, 1px warm hairline, 16px radius. Flat at rest, single shadow tier on hover.
components.html:
API Development

Robust, versioned REST and GraphQL APIs built for integration at scale. Clean contracts, thorough documentation.
components.css: .ds-feature-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-feature-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); } .ds-feature-title { color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: 0; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-feature-body { color: #4e4e4e; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Canonical form field. White background, stone outline, 8px radius. 2px ink border on focus — no color ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 12px 16px; background: #ffffff; color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; border: 1px solid #d6d3d1; border-radius: 8px; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a8a29e; } .ds-input:focus { border: 2px solid #0c0a09; padding: 11px 15px; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: 64px off-white nav bar. Wordmark left, minimal links center, ink pill CTA right. Links fade on hover — no color shift.
components.html:
Gawa Developer
  • Services
  • Process
  • Contact
Start Your Project
components.css: .ds-topnav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 24px; background: #f5f5f5; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-wordmark { color: #0c0a09; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-muted { color: #777169; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { color: #0c0a09; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { opacity: 0.55; } .ds-btn-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #292524; color: #ffffff; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 9999px; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-nav-cta:hover { background: #0c0a09; }

components.name: Gradient Orb Card
components.description: Signature ElevenLabs-direction pattern. Soft radial gradient orb behind display copy — atmospheric decoration only, never a content container. Use one of the five gradient tokens (mint/peach/lavender/sky/rose).
components.html:
Build Better Software

We engineer scalable applications and automation that help companies streamline operations and grow with confidence.
components.css: .ds-orb-card { position: relative; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 24px; padding: 32px; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-orb-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 320px; height: 320px; border-radius: 50%; pointer-events: none; } .ds-orb-mint::before { background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(167, 229, 211, 0.38) 0%, transparent 70%); } .ds-orb-peach::before { background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(244, 197, 168, 0.38) 0%, transparent 70%); } .ds-orb-lavender::before { background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(200, 184, 224, 0.38) 0%, transparent 70%); } .ds-orb-sky::before { background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(168, 200, 232, 0.38) 0%, transparent 70%); } .ds-orb-rose::before { background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(232, 184, 196, 0.38) 0%, transparent 70%); } .ds-orb-title { position: relative; color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'EB Garamond', 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.13; letter-spacing: -0.32px; margin: 0 0 12px 0; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-orb-body { position: relative; color: #4e4e4e; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; margin: 0; max-width: 60ch; }

components.name: Dark Tier Card
components.description: Inverted dark card for featured pricing tiers, dark CTA bands, or high-emphasis service callouts. Obsidian background, white text, muted-soft sub-text.
components.html:
ENTERPRISE

Full-Stack Partnership

Dedicated engineering team, custom SLA, and end-to-end ownership from architecture to deployment.
components.css: .ds-dark-card { background: #0c0a09; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dark-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.96px; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 9999px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-dark-title { color: #ffffff; font-family: 'EB Garamond', 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.17; letter-spacing: -0.36px; margin: 0 0 12px 0; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-dark-body { color: #a8a29e; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.16px; margin: 0 0 24px 0; max-width: 55ch; } .ds-dark-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #ffffff; color: #0c0a09; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-dark-cta:hover { background: #f0efed; }

narrative.overview:
Gawa Developer's design direction borrows from the quietly editorial register of ElevenLabs' marketing surfaces — a voice-AI brand whose pages read like a print magazine that happens to sell software. The base canvas is off-white (#f5f5f5), not pure white, not warm cream — its neutrality is deliberate. The ink is warm near-black (#0c0a09), almost but not quite black. The only moments of 'color' are five atmospheric gradient orbs (mint, peach, lavender, sky, rose) that drift through hero bands and feature sections as decoration — they carry no content, they are pure atmosphere.

Display type runs Waldenburg Light at weight 300. This single decision defines the editorial voice: a serif at weight 300 is a magazine caption, not a tech billboard. Inter handles body, navigation, captions, and buttons — the workhorse paired against the signature. The CTA is an ink pill, the same near-black as the text — not orange, not a gradient, not a saturated action color. Its restraint is the signal.

This system explicitly rejects: gradient-heavy SaaS hero dashboards with large metric stats; overcrowded agency sites that list services without hierarchy; dark-canvas developer-portfolio aesthetics that prioritize mood over conversion; and sites that saturate CTAs with brand color. The design earns trust through restraint. The agency is the product; the site should feel like a serious agency's calling card.
keyCharacteristics: Off-white canvas (#f5f5f5) — not warm, not cool. Neutral editorial paper.
Warm near-black ink (#0c0a09) — CTAs, primary text, and pill buttons share the same ink.
Waldenburg Light weight 300 for all display copy — editorial magazine voice, never bold.
Inter at +0.15-0.18px tracking for body — subtly looser than raw Inter for editorial feel.
Atmospheric gradient orbs (mint/peach/lavender/sky/rose) — decoration only, never content containers.
Pill geometry for all CTAs and badges; 16px rounded rectangle for cards.
Ink pill is the sole CTA color — no orange, no saturated action accent.

rules.name: The Ink Pill Rule
rules.body: The primary CTA uses the same near-black ink as the body text (#292524). There is no separate CTA accent color. The restraint is intentional — the CTA earns attention through placement and hierarchy, not through color.

rules.name: The Atmosphere Rule
rules.body: Gradient orbs are decoration only. They appear as soft radial blooms behind copy — never as button fills, text colors, or card backgrounds. Their rarity is what gives them brand voltage.

rules.name: The Weight-300 Doctrine
rules.body: Display type stays at Waldenburg weight 300. Bolding any display headline shifts the voice from editorial restraint to consumer-marketing loudness. The signature is in the lightness.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards are flat at rest (no shadow, no border lift). A single shadow tier (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)) appears on hover only. Depth is earned through interaction.

rules.name: The Pill-or-Rectangle Rule
rules.body: CTAs and badges use pill geometry (border-radius: 9999px). Content cards use 16px rounded rectangles. These two shapes are the entire border-radius vocabulary — no mix of values.

dos: Do reserve the ink pill (#292524) for primary CTAs. It is the only CTA color.
Do use Waldenburg Light (or EB Garamond as substitute) at weight 300 for every display headline.
Do set Inter at +0.15-0.18px letter-spacing for body text — the editorial dialect.
Do use atmospheric gradient orbs (mint/peach/lavender/sky/rose) as radial background decoration only.
Do keep cards flat at rest. Shadow appears on :hover only — one tier maximum.
Do use pill geometry (9999px) for all CTAs and badges; 16px radius for cards.
Do cap body line length at 65–75ch.
Do use text-wrap: balance on display headings to prevent awkward line breaks.
donts: Don't introduce a saturated brand accent color. No orange CTA, no neon, no gradient text. Ink pill is the only CTA.
Don't bold display copy. Weight 300 is non-negotiable — bolding destroys the editorial voice.
Don't use gradient orbs as button fills, text colors, or card surfaces. Atmosphere only.
Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section heading. One deliberate badge per feature, not a grammar for every section.
Don't use sharp 0px border-radius on any interactive element. Pills for CTAs, 16px for cards.
Don't build gradient-heavy hero sections with large metric stat dashboards.
Don't use border-left stripes as card accents. Use background tints or nothing.
Don't use dark-canvas developer-portfolio aesthetics that prioritize mood over conversion.
Don't animate layout properties. All motion via transform and opacity only.
